missions.name: Talk to the Oracle
missions.description: Go to the temple and talk to the Oracle to choose your vocation.

missions.description: Find the chest in the sewers to get your first equipment.

missions.description: Kill 10 rats in the basement.

missions.description: Cast the Light spell to prove your magical ability.

missions.name: Starting Lever
missions.description: Pull the lever to start the dog race.

missions.name: North Lap
missions.description: Step on the northern lap tile.

missions.name: South Lap
missions.description: Step on the southern lap tile.

missions.name: The Stone Barrier
missions.description: Pull the stone lever to dispel the barrier in Draconia.

missions.name: The Hidden Passage
missions.description: Use the key at the lever to unlock the hidden passage.

missions.name: Hidden Entrance
missions.description: Step on the hidden tile in the Venore depot to enter the underground.
